title: A job interview
explanation:
A job interview

Transcript

Interviewer: Tell me about your experience.
Candidate: I worked in a shop for two years. I was responsible for customer service.
Interviewer: Why do you want this job?
Candidate: I enjoy working with people and I want to learn new skills.
Interviewer: When can you start?
Candidate: I can start next month.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option.

questions.text: The candidate enjoys working with ____. | *people | machines | animals
They want to learn new ____. | *skills | languages | rules
The interviewer asks about their ____. | *experience | holiday | family
The interviewer asks: 'When can you ____?' | *start | finish | leave

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: This is a [*job interview|doctor's appointment|hotel booking].
The candidate gives [*positive|negative|no] reasons for wanting the job.
The candidate has [*some|no|twenty years of] shop experience.
